items.title: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
items.description: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.

items.title: Huge chunk of glacier blocks Everest route in peak climbing season
items.description: Sherpas cannot prepare the route to the world's highest peak because a huge block of ice is in the way.

items.title: Warner Bros shareholders approve Paramount's $111bn takeover
items.description: The approval came as Donald Trump is to attend a dinner with billionaire Paramount backers the Ellisons.

items.title: South African police chief suspended over $20m health contract
items.description: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.

items.title: More than 500 people killed in Tanzania election violence, inquiry finds
items.description: Opposition parties accused security forces but the official report does not say who was responsible.
